title: Ak 47
description: This is my minecraft Recourcepack to turn your Crosbow into an AK 47
body:
Do you dont like the Crossbow? Do you want to replace it with an AK47? Then i have something for you! This is my **NEW** Recourcepack that turns **your**  Crossbow into an Poorly moddeled AK47 

Btw this Recourcpack is made for 1.19.3 and above if something doesnt work please send a message in the Discord :D

https://discord.gg/vNWRpb5f
